name: freelancer managing 5–10 projects/month tool
description: For freelancers managing 5–10 projects/month, budget mismanagement causes cash flow gaps. We automate budget tracking instead of manual spreadsheets and email notifications.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking project budgets accurately across multiple clients.
